meaning: adj.蛇一般的,弯弯曲曲的,阴险的,多蛇的
examples: By path snaky but on, can see gold melon lithic a corner.
Description: Snaky jay - Find out what happens to Snaky Jake when he leaves the zoo!
High stone walls topped with snaky concertina wire, set off at intervals by looming guard towers.
The Chief took corners smoothly, in the prowling, snaky manner of a driver unconcerned about regulating his speed.
At times, Undiscovered falls back on agreeable but conventional neo-soul, but on "The Pieces Don't Fit Anymore, " Morrison seizes on a hauntingly snaky hook that burrows under the skin.
